title: Question on Eva 01 Bloody Type
wikitext:
[]: Question on Eva 01 Bloody Type             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Dec 02, 2008 9:30 pm Alright, I looked around and could not find anything on this matter but I'm sure its been asked before. I'm watching Rebuild cause I'm waiting for a download to end and its at the part where Eva 01 is "breaking through" Sachi's ATF. It shows the Blood Types for Sachi and Eva 01. Target Object : ATF : Pattern Blood Type : Blue A Eva 01 Core Unit Eva 01 is a "clone" of Lilith which is the mother of the Lilim IE Humans. Humans have Red Blood and since Eva 01 is a direct clone of Lilith the mother of Humans, shouldn't Eva01 have Type Red? I understand that Lilith is still an Angel but....? Input?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 02, 2008 9:36 pm "Blood Type Pattern" doesn't have anything to do with the blood's actual color. For example, the Angels are (usually) classified as "Pattern Blue", but (except for Sachiel in NGE) all observed blood is the standard vertebrate red. As for what the terminology actually designates, and what the difference is between all the types we hear about (blue, orange, green, sepia, and red), I still have no idea.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Dec 02, 2008 9:56 pm The "pattern blue" thing has nothing to do with actual blood (nor do humans have "pattern red") it's based off a cheesy old Japanese scifi movie which Anno, as a total neeerd along with the other Gainax boys, thought was a classic the plot is something like that around the world, people see UFO's in the sky; anyone who saw a UFO, their blood inexplicably turns blue in color. Unfortunately, the same old human hysteria and paranoia begin to take effect, and the "blood type blue" UFO-sighters start getting persecuted and rounded up into internment camps or worse. Social commentary there. Anyway, Angels are "blood pattern blue", "blood pattern red" is an ANTI-AT Field. Admittedly, this isn't an aspect of the series that was supposed to actually make sense but was an obscure movie reference.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Dec 02, 2008 10:04 pm Well that answers my questions, thank you. Man, Anno is one crazy guy.

[]:             Quote Post by Semisubtle » Tue Dec 02, 2008 11:10 pm I've got blood patterns blue, orange, and red down, but what has green and sepia?

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Wed Dec 03, 2008 3:01 am Blue blood was a ancient Briton symbol/sign of royalty. also, the red/blue Eva dichotomy. other than that, I have no idea how blue blood is relevant.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Dec 03, 2008 3:03 am Semisubtle wrote: but what has green and sepia?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Wed Dec 03, 2008 3:12 am Sepia is from #20, when they're trying to untang Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 03, 2008 5:35 am Green shows up during the pilot-swap experiment in #14.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Dec 03, 2008 7:12 am V wrote: Anyway, Angels are "blood pattern blue", "blood pattern red" is an ANTI-AT Field.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 03, 2008 12:51 pm ep26' wrote: Shigeru: Unidentified high-energy source approaching rapidly from Terminal Dogma! Makoto: AT Field verified! Analysis pattern blue!! Maya: It's not... an Angel!? Makoto: No! It's... a person!? It's human!

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Thu Dec 04, 2008 5:18 am ITT contradiction.
summary: []: Question on Eva 01 Bloody Type             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Dec 02, 2008 9:30 pm Alright, I looked around and could not find anything on this matter but I'm sure its been asked before. I'm watching Rebuild cause I'm waiting for a download to end and its at the part where Eva 01 is "breaking through" Sachi's ATF. It shows the Blood Types for Sachi and Eva 01.
